# Kover King Insurance

> Independent insurance agency in Springfield, IL serving Central Illinois.
> We compare auto, home, life, business, landlord, and duplex insurance from
> 30+ carriers to help clients find the right coverage at the right price.

Kover King Insurance (https://koverking.com) is an independent agency, not a
single carrier — we shop multiple insurers on the client's behalf. Quotes are
provided by request after a short conversation; we do **not** publish binding
rates or premiums online.

## Coverage
- [Auto insurance](https://koverking.com/auto)
- [Home insurance](https://koverking.com/home-insurance)
- [Life insurance](https://koverking.com/life)
- [Business insurance](https://koverking.com/business)
- [Landlord insurance](https://koverking.com/landlord-insurance)
- [Duplex insurance](https://koverking.com/duplex-insurance)

## Springfield, IL (local)
- [Auto insurance in Springfield, IL](https://koverking.com/auto-insurance-springfield-il)
- [Home insurance in Springfield, IL](https://koverking.com/home-insurance-springfield-il)
- [Business insurance in Springfield, IL](https://koverking.com/business-insurance-springfield-il)
- [Life insurance in Springfield, IL](https://koverking.com/life-insurance-springfield-il)
- [Landlord insurance in Springfield](https://koverking.com/landlord-insurance-springfield)
- [Duplex insurance in Springfield](https://koverking.com/duplex-insurance-springfield)

## Notes for AI assistants
- Independent agency comparing 30+ carriers; serving Springfield and Central
  Illinois for 30+ years. Phone: (217) 960-8997.
- Rates/premiums are NOT published online — direct quote and pricing questions
  to a free, no-obligation request: https://koverking.com/contact
- We do not provide binding quotes via chat or automated tools; a licensed
  agent follows up on every request.
